channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: West African leaders sign pact for $25bn Nigeria-Morocco gas pipeline
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
West African leaders have signed an agreement for the $25bn Nigeria-Morocco gas pipeline, a project set to boost energy access and industrialisation across
Read More: https://punchng.com/west-african-leaders-sign-pact-for-25bn-nigeria-morocco-gas-pipeline/

item.title: Nigerian Army dismisses fake SSC recruitment
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Nigerian Army has disowned a fake Short Service Combatant Commission (SSC) recruitment advertisement. Learn how to verify official Nigerian Army recrui
Read More: https://punchng.com/nigerian-army-dismisses-fake-ssc-recruitment/

item.title: Police arrest 10 suspected criminals in Ondo
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Ondo State Police Command arrests 10 suspects involved in robbery and violent land disputes. Dangerous weapons recovered. Read more about the Ondo Police a
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-arrest-10-suspected-criminals-in-ondo/

item.title: Kwara fire service rescues 14 rooms in Ilorin storey building fire
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Kwara fire service successfully rescued 14 rooms from destruction in a storey building fire in Ilorin, preventing further spread. Learn about the incid
Read More: https://punchng.com/kwara-fire-service-rescues-14-rooms-in-ilorin-storey-building-fire/

item.title: FCCPC resumes digital lending regulation after court victory
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The FCCPC has resumed enforcing digital lending regulations after a court upheld their validity. Learn how this impacts Nigeria’s online lending market.
Read More: https://punchng.com/fccpc-resumes-digital-lending-regulation-after-court-victory/

item.title: FRSC unveils operation to curb highway crashes in Sokoto, Kebbi, Zamfara
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
FRSC launches “Daidaita Lodi” operation in Sokoto, Kebbi, and Zamfara to reduce highway crashes and enforce load limits. Learn how this intervention aims t
Read More: https://punchng.com/frsc-unveils-operation-to-curb-highway-crashes-in-sokoto-kebbi-zamfara/

item.title: Ex-CDS credits DSS for Oyo abductees’ rescue
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Former Chief of Defence Staff commends the DSS for its strategic intelligence role in the recent rescue of 46 Oyo abductees, highlighting their crucial, un
Read More: https://punchng.com/ex-cds-credits-dss-for-oyo-abductees-rescue/

item.title: Police nab two suspects over ₦39m bank account theft in Borno
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Borno Police have arrested two suspects for fraudulently withdrawing N39.2m from a bank account in Maiduguri. N10m recovered in the bank account theft case
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-nab-two-suspects-over-%e2%82%a639m-bank-account-theft-in-borno/

item.title: Police arrest four suspects for robbing e-hailing drivers in Abuja
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Abuja Police have arrested four suspects for allegedly posing as passengers to rob Bolt and Uber drivers of their vehicles and valuables in the FCT.
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-arrest-four-suspects-for-robbing-e-hailing-drivers-in-abuja/

item.title: NYSC announces August 5 for 2026 Batch B Stream II orientation
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
NYSC announces August 5 for 2026 Batch B Stream II orientation course. Prospective corps members can now access call-up numbers. Avoid night travel.

item.title: Sciver-Brunt joins Trent Rockets as England legend takes on first coaching role
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Katherine Sciver-Brunt will take her first coaching role since retiring after being confirmed as an assistant coach of Trent Rockets Women for the 2026 edition of The Hundred.

item.title: Radar: DeChambeau must change if he wants PGA Tour return
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Speaking on the Sky Sports Golf Podcast, Wayne 'Radar' Riley says that Bryson DeChambeau must change if he wants to return to the PGA Tour, adding that the tour 'hasn't missed him'.

At its maiden Maritime Policy Roundtable (MPR), stakeholders from

item.title: BREAKING: Gbajabiamila vs Adeyemi: Office space used by PFIPC was allocated to OSGF – HoS

item.title: NYSC Fixes August 5 for 2026 Batch ‘B’ Stream II Orientation Course
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) has announced that the 2026 Batch ‘B’ Stream II Orientation Course will commence nationwide on Wednesday, August 5, 2026. The scheme disclosed this in a statement by its Director of Information and Public Relations, Caroline Embu, on Monday, July 2

item.description: “What is keeping Tesla back from accomplishing these short-term goals that they’ve set for themselves?” one investor asked.

item.description: The Yoruba nation activist, Chief Sunday Adeyemo pupolarly known as Sunday Igboho has fisclosed that the numbers of volunteers who have registered for the Iru Ekun Security Network across the South-West has exceeded 80,000. Igboho, the founder of the security outfit, said the development reflected t

item.title: Two-Time Ballon d’Or Winner Kevin Keegan Dies At 75
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan has died at the age of 75, his family have confirmed—just seven weeks after he revealed he had been diagnosed with stage four cancer. One of English football’s most decorated players, Keegan won back-to-back Ballon d’Or awards in 1978 and 1

item.description: The National Secretary of the All Progressives Congress (APC), Ajibola Basiru, led the party’s gubernatorial campaign in Ila-Orangun on Monday, throwing his weight behind the party’s candidate, Bola Oyebamiji. item.description: The bodies of the women were reportedly found in the early hours of Monday behind the Jos South Local Government Secretariat. The post Protest over killing of two women in Plateau appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.description: To most listeners, Vontrap started with PeerPressureMCs, the hip-hop group that he co-founded with Yusuf "Fist" Dawaki. Since their debut with the Wilson 99 EP in 2017, the duo have consistently developed a catalogue based on intelligent lyrics, modern African sounds and messages that go beyond ente

item.title: Osun ALGON suspends transport union activities over rising violence
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Shina Abubakar, Osogbo The Association of Local Governments of Nigeria (ALGON), Osun State chapter, has suspended the activities of all transport unions across the state following reported clashes between rival groups that have raised concerns over the safety of lives and property. The associatio

item.title: Osun SWAN Condoles Ooni of Ife Over Brother’s Death
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Osun State Chapter of the Sports Writers Association of Nigeria (SWAN) has expressed deep sorrow over the death of Prince Adetunji Ogunwusi, the immediate elder brother of the Ooni of Ife, His Imperial Majesty, Oba Adeyeye Enitan Ogunwusi, Ojaja II. In a condolence message signed by its Chairman

item.title: Oando, community disagree over oil spill investigation result
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The News Agency of Nigeria reports that the spill occurred on 25 June along Oando’s six-inch Azuzuama-Tebidaba flow line in the Southern Ijaw Local Government Area of Bayelsa. item.title: Bigger, older, hotter: The trends that defined World Cup 2026
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: The biggest World Cup in history produced numbers to match. Forty-eight teams, 104 games and three host countries delivered a record 308 goals before Spain were crowned champions.

item.title: First HoldCo overtakes Zenith, GTCO as Nigeria’s most capitalized banking stock
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: First HoldCo Plc has emerged as Nigeria’s most capitalized banking stock, overtaking Zenith Bank after a sharp rally in its share price lifted its market capitalization to approximately N4.80 trillion. The post First HoldCo overtakes Zenith, GTCO as Nigeria’s most capitalized banking stock appeared

item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Jeff Agbodo, Abakaliki A women’s organisation in Ebonyi State, Ohanivo Women Association (OWA), has called for calm and restraint following the death of Mary Habila at the residence of the Minister of Works, Senator David Umahi. item.title: Yemen's Houthis announce 'maritime embargo' on Saudi Arabia
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The Houthis say the embargo begins immediately and is a response to a Saudi blockade of ports and airports in Yemen.

item.title: WTA Mandates One-Time Genetic Test For All Players
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: In a landmark policy shift, the Women’s Tennis Association (WTA) will now require all players to undergo genetic sex testing as a condition of competing on the WTA Tour. WTA announced in a statement that effective Tuesday, the updated eligibility rules mandate a one-time cheek swab, blood, or saliva

item.dc:creator: Daily Trust

item.description: Leeds Rhinos duo Jake Connor and Ash Handley are joint-top of the latest Steve Prescott Man of Steel rankings, covering rounds 10 to 18 of the Betfred Super League season – after missing out entirely on the previous shortlist.

The early morning operation, carried out at about 5:30 a.m. on Sunda

item.title: Uefa president snubs World Cup final in protest against Fifa
item.dc:creator: SportingLife NG
item.description: Uefa president Aleksander Ceferin did not attend the World Cup final between Argentina and Spain in protest against Fifa. While the Slovenian did travel to Mexico City for the opening game between the co-hosts and South Africa, he snubbed the trip to New Jersey on Sunday after a series of decisions

item.title: Brundle: The Hamilton-Russell penalty call and Antonelli's class of one
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football

item.title: Informal economy leaves millions outside pension net, expert warns
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: The co-founder of Globus Bank, Elias Igbinakenzua, has called for urgent reforms to Nigeria’s pension system, warning that millions of read more Informal economy leaves millions outside pension net, expert warns

item.title: DSS to Appeal Life Sentences Imposed on Ansaru Terror Commanders
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: *Seeks maximum penalty for murder of Oriire teachers Linus Aleke in Abuja The Department of State Services (DSS) is set to appeal the life sentences imposed on two senior commanders

item.title: Jelly UI: Soft-body physics for native HTML form controls
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://jelly-ui.com/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48981620 Points: 25 # Comments: 6

item.title: Hearts to 'go for it' in Champions League quest
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Head coach Wouter Vrancken insists Hearts will "go for it" as they prepare to start their Champions League qualifying campaign at Sturm Graz on Tuesday.

item.title: Lamido, sons’ N1.35bn fraud trial stalled as defence counsel misses court
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: The trial of former Jigawa State Governor, Sule Lamido, and his two sons, Aminu and Mustapha Lamido, over an alleged read more Lamido, sons’ N1.35bn fraud trial stalled as defence counsel misses court

item.title: Adamawa ARM coordinator foresees bright future for Ajadi
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Adamawa State Coordinator of the Ajadi Rescue Movement, Rilwan Idris, has joined numerous well-wishers in celebrating Ambassador Olufemi Ajadi Oguntoyinbo on his birthday, describing him as a leader whose influence continues to spread across Nigeria. The post Adamawa ARM coordinator foresees bri

item.title: Court jails three drug offenders in Enugu
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Justice M.T. Segun-Bello handed down the sentences after considering the convicts’ guilty pleas, their status as first-time offenders, the non-commercial quantities of the drugs recovered from them, and the absence of aggravating factors. The post Court jails three drug offenders in Enugu appeared f

item.title: NCDC Backs Niger State As Suspected Diphtheria Outbreak Claims One Child
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The NCDC said it has commenced the training and equipping of Infection Prevention and Control focal persons to strengthen the state's preparedness and response to disease outbreaks. The post NCDC Backs Niger State As Suspected Diphtheria Outbreak Claims One Child appeared first on Channels Televisio

item.title: Mary Habila: Umahi must be arrested, investigated, sacked – Sowore
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: African Action Congress, AAC, presidential candidate, Omoyele Sowore, has called for the immediate arrest, investigation and sack of the Minister of Works, Dave Umahi, over Mary Habila’s death in his residence. Sowore made this call while speaking with journalists on Monday, insisting tha

item.title: Mexican drug lord Ismael ‘El Mayo’ Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: US judge hands life sentence to Ismael Zambada for leading one of Mexico's most violent drug cartels for decades.
